have h₁ : ∃ r, mul lhs rhs = ok r := by
    have h₂ : mul lhs rhs = ok (mul_impl lhs rhs) := by
      simp [mul]
      <;> rfl
    refine' ⟨mul_impl lhs rhs, _⟩
    exact h₂
  
  have h₂ : ∀ (r : Array U64 5#usize), mul lhs rhs = ok r → Field51_as_Nat r ≡ (Field51_as_Nat lhs) * (Field51_as_Nat rhs) [MOD p] := by
    intro r hr
    have h₃ : mul lhs rhs = ok r := hr
    have h₄ : r = mul_impl lhs rhs := by
      have h₅ : mul lhs rhs = ok (mul_impl lhs rhs) := by
        simp [mul]
        <;> rfl
      have h₆ : mul lhs rhs = ok r := h₃
      have h₇ : ok r = ok (mul_impl lhs rhs) := by
        rw [h₆] at *
        <;> simp_all [h₅]
      simp [Option.ext_iff] at h₇
      <;> simp_all
      <;> aesop
    rw [h₄]
    sorry
  
  have h₃ : ∀ (r : Array U64 5#usize), mul lhs rhs = ok r → (∀ i < 5, r[i]!.val < 2 ^ 52) := by
    intro r hr
    have h₄ : mul lhs rhs = ok r := hr
    have h₅ : r = mul_impl lhs rhs := by
      have h₆ : mul lhs rhs = ok (mul_impl lhs rhs) := by
        simp [mul]
        <;> rfl
      have h₇ : mul lhs rhs = ok r := h₄
      have h₈ : ok r = ok (mul_impl lhs rhs) := by
        rw [h₇] at *
        <;> simp_all [h₆]
      simp [Option.ext_iff] at h₈
      <;> simp_all
      <;> aesop
    rw [h₅]
    sorry
  
  obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := h₁
  have h₄ : Field51_as_Nat r ≡ (Field51_as_Nat lhs) * (Field51_as_Nat rhs) [MOD p] := h₂ r hr
  have h₅ : (∀ i < 5, r[i]!.val < 2 ^ 52) := h₃ r hr
  exact ⟨r, hr, h₄, h₅⟩

  have h₂ : a n = 1 := hn.1

    have h₆₁ := hseq (n + 1)
    have h₆₂ : a (n + 1) = 1 := h₅
    simp [h₆₂] at h₆₁
    <;> norm_cast at h₆₁ ⊢ <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try simp_all [a]) <;>
    (try omega)

    (try

    simp [h₇₂] at h₇₁
    <;> norm_cast at h₇₁ ⊢ <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try simp_all [a]) <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try

        cases n <;>
        simp_all [a, Nat.gcd_eq_right, Nat.gcd_eq_left] <;>

      })
  -- Substitute `a n = 1` and `a (n + 2) = 1` into the constraints

    norm_cast
    <;> simp_all
  have h₉ : (a (n + 2) : ℕ) = 1 := by

    <;> simp_all
